prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约9599→9115→8828→14097→11769，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字增大=竞争加剧）。2024年因专业组结构调整出现较大波动（不限 组位次降至14097），2025年回升至11769，近两年均值约12933名；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划2021年56人、2022年59人、2023年52人、2024年56人、2025年5 8人；2026年计划54人，较2025年减少4人（缩招约6.9%），缩招使竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学（威海）为985、211、双一流高校，共享山东大学软科主榜排 名，2021–2026年稳定位列全国第22名，属于顶尖高校层次，对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及2019年学伴事件遗留影响；抖音热度 总排名第20（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；未见近年明显投档断档记录；山东大学拥有数学A+、中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A、控制科学与工 程A、马克思主义理论A等19个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对物理类考生报考电子信息类、数学类等专业有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2026年专业 热度为高热推荐，计算机类为推荐，数学/统计为推荐，工科专业整体热度高；江苏省2026年普通高考考生总数约52.1万人，较2025年（约35.8万）大幅增加约45%，物理类考生估 算约37.9万人（+45%），竞争显著加剧；山东大学（威海）位于山东省威海市，与江苏省相邻，地域偏好较强；该校在江 苏省招生计划占比较小（约54–58人），属跨省招生，受本省考生规模变化影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11769名、2026年物理类计划缩招6.9%、江苏省考生总 数大幅增加约45%以及工科专业热度持续高企等因素，预计2026年物理类竞争较2025年进一步加剧。预测最低位次约11782名，区间11282–12282名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9599 → 9115 → 8828 → 14097 → 11769, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (increasing ranking number indicates intensified competition). In 2024, due to adjustments in major group structure, there was a significant fluctuation (the unrestricted group ranking dropped to 14097), and in 2025 it rebounded to 11769, with a two-year average of about 12933. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu Province was 56 in 2021, 59 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 56 in 2024, and 58 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 54, a decrease of 4 from 2025 (a reduction of about 6.9%), which intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University (Weihai) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, sharing the main ranking of Shandong University on the Soft Science Ranking. From 2021 to 2026, it has been stably ranked 22nd nationally, belonging to the top-tier university level, with strong and sustained appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to the lingering impact of the 2019 study partner incident. Its Douyin heat ranking is 20th (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention. No obvious recent enrollment gaps have been recorded. Shandong University has 19 A- or above disciplines, including Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, and Marxist Theory A, with strong disciplinary strength, which strongly attracts Physics Category candidates to apply for majors such as Electronic Information and Mathematics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended, Computer Science is recommended, Mathematics/Statistics is recommended, and engineering majors overall have high popularity. The total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45% from 2025 (about 358,000). Physics Category candidates are estimated to be about 379,000 (+45%), significantly intensifying competition. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, adjacent to Jiangsu Province, with strong regional preference. The university's enrollment plan in Jiangsu Province is relatively small (about 54–58 people), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, and is greatly affected by changes in the number of local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 11769, the 2026 Physics Category enrollment reduction of 6.9%, the significant increase of about 45% in the total number of candidates in Jiangsu Province, and the sustained high popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that competition in Physics Category in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 11782, with a range of 11282–12282.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Intelligent Engineering New Engineering Experimental Class)
- Mathematics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 11282–12282, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors like Physics/Marine Science as the main direction, Tier 1 majors like Electronic Information/Mathematics as a sprint (requires ranking significantly better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors like Economics as a safety net. When the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, prioritize Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2294 → 1922 → 2229 → 2155 → 2253, fluctuating narrowly within the 1900–2300 range, stabilizing around 2150–2250 in recent 3 years, with a 2025 baseline of about 2253; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu was 21 students each year from 2021 to 2024, dropping to 18 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22 students, an increase of 4 students (about 22.2% expansion) compared to 2025, which alleviates competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly involves campus safety incidents, which have limited impact on liberal arts applications; Douyin popularity ranks 20th overall (high heat), with overall high attention; Shandong University has advantageous disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Law A-, Applied Economics A-, which highly match the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Economics, Foreign Languages and Literature); Shandong University (Weihai) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, sharing Shandong University's main ranking of 22nd on the Soft Science Ranking, with a top-tier level that also strongly attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Literature major popularity is recommended, Law is recommended (but polarized), Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Jiangsu in 2026 is about 142,000 (+46%), a significant increase in candidate scale; Shandong University (Weihai) is adjacent to Jiangsu Province, with strong cross-province application regional preference; the History Category enrollment plan of 22 students is a small-scale enrollment, greatly affected by fluctuations in total candidate numbers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 2253, the 2026 History Category enrollment expansion of 22.2%, and the significant increase of about 46% in Jiangsu candidate numbers, the expansion relief effect is partially offset by the candidate surge, leading to slightly intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2603, with a range of 2232–2974.
